help_dialog.title: Game guide
help_dialog.intro: Among Liars is a social deduction game. Each player receives a secret role.
help_dialog.town_desc: The Town must identify and eliminate threats.
help_dialog.mafia_desc: The Mafia eliminates villagers at night while staying hidden.
help_dialog.phase_night: Night — Each player uses their power in secret. The Mafia chooses a target to eliminate.
help_dialog.phase_report: Report — The village discovers the night's victims.
help_dialog.phase_discussion: Discussion — Debate, accuse, defend yourself. Use chat or voice.
help_dialog.phase_vote: Vote — Vote against a suspect. A majority is needed to accuse.
help_dialog.phase_defense: Defense — The accused gets a last chance to defend themselves.
help_dialog.phase_judgment: Judgment — Vote Guilty or Innocent. If guilty, the player is executed.
help_dialog.win_town: Town — Eliminate all Mafia members and neutral threats.
help_dialog.win_mafia: Mafia — Reach majority over other players.
help_dialog.win_cult: Cult — Convert enough players to reach majority.
help_dialog.win_sk: Serial Killer — Be the last one standing.
help_dialog.win_survivor: Survivor — Stay alive until the end.
help_dialog.cmd_pm: -pm player message — Send a private message to a player
help_dialog.cmd_lw: -lw text — Write your last will (revealed upon death)
help_dialog.cmd_skip: -skip — Vote to skip the discussion phase

survey.title: Your thoughts on this game
survey.subtitle: A few quick questions to help us improve.
survey.question: Overall, did you enjoy this game?
survey.q_clarity: Did you understand your role and actions?
survey.comment_placeholder: Tell us what could be better…
